title: WhereWaterGo (Bigger Sponge)
description: Better Sponge, change & configure the Range and Amount of Water
body:
A mod I literally created in about 30 minutes because [Shadowstone](https://www.twitch.tv/shadowstone) made a half joke about it. - Increases Sponge Drain Range & Amount for Ocean Draining - Configurable using oωo & Mod Menu - Undo Feature (In-testing) - Server side (technically) See the mod in action : https://clips.twitch.tv/BlazingLivelyTaroJonCarnage-9e77A5ecPn5On8EJ
And more : https://clips.twitch.tv/TrappedAmazingCrowKappa-BDiVMMYXf7c-U8Op This mod also slightly cleans up some of the code for the sponge in general, giving slight performance boost. (Due to this, this mod won't be very compatible with a lot of other sponge related mods) ## Requirements Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) + [oωo (owo-lib)](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib)
[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) for easy Config editing --- *Slight warning, going crazy (~~because that's totally not the point of this mod~~) may cause you to crash or lag badly, not recommended for large server use. Draining mass amount of water will cause Kelp and water plants to break resulting in many dropped items on the ground* ![Help, my boat is flooding](https://i.imgur.com/smEuVPA.gif) **Why stop at just water though? Why not suck down some Lava as fast as I suck down coffee?**
SpongeSucc (Lava Sponge aka Where Lava Go) - https://modrinth.com/mod/spongesucc *Feel free to use this mod in other modpacks but keep the download within the Modrinth Ecosystem and do not reupload*
